title: NTM Space
description: The fork of NTM that adds Space Travel
body:
This is a fork of HBM's Nuclear Tech mod (as seen below)

[https://github.com/HbmMods/Hbm-s-Nuclear-Tech-GIT](https://github.com/HbmMods/Hbm-s-Nuclear-Tech-GIT)

the difference here is that there is a custom rocket system, custom atmospheres, planets, and much more.

feel free to check it out! heres a video to get an idea:
[https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Dgh6G62YWBM&lc=UgwAISL4LbE2BbUzP6N4AaABAg](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Dgh6G62YWBM&lc=UgwAISL4LbE2BbUzP6N4AaABAg)

Co-Developed by Mellow
[https://mellow.games](https://mellow.games)

while you are here, check out some of my contributors works too:

FUNG by mellowarpeggiation
https://store.steampowered.com/app/24...

Space OST by DUODEC
[‪@duodec1222‬](https://www.youtube.com/@duodec1222)
